metadata.name: Motor Starter with Electronic Braking and Mechanical Contact Guidance
metadata.description: Control and power schematic showing an electronic braking device with start/stop control and mechanical contact guidance on the Off button.

elements.name: S1 / Off
elements.description: Off pushbutton (normally closed) used to interrupt the control circuit and stop the motor; includes mechanical contact guidance.

elements.name: S2 / On
elements.description: On pushbutton (normally open) used to energize the contactor coil Q1 and start the motor.

elements.name: Q1 Contactor
elements.description: Contactor coil and main contacts controlling power to the motor; provides feedback to braking device K1.

elements.name: K1 Electronic braking device
elements.description: Electronic braking device with microcontroller for release and braking start control.

elements.name: M1 3~
elements.description: Three-phase motor controlled by contactor Q1 and braked by electronic brake K1.

elements.name: L
elements.description: Three-phase power supply feeding the contactor, motor, and braking unit.
